name: Exposed in the girls changing room (ABDL)
description:
Tags: Diaper, diapers, abdl, exposed, femdom.

You have decided to get a gym membership. It’s your first time and you make your way to the wardrobe. Few people are here as you hoped and it’s time to get changed. Half way naked you get an unwelcome surprise, turning your gym visit into a humiliating and unforgettable experience.
creator: MarkDL
